wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Pacifico&family=Lato:wght@300;400;700&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#fff7ed!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Lato',sans-serif!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#9a3412!important;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(154,52,18,.4)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{padding:14px 24px!important;color:#9a3412!important;font-weight:500!important;letter-spacing:.02em;transition:all .25s;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(154,52,18,.07)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{background:#c2410c!important;color:#ffffff!important;padding-left:30px!important;} .foodie-header{background:linear-gradient(150deg,#7c2d12,#9a3412);padding:24px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,237,213,.15);} .foodie-cats{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px;} .foodie-cats span{background:rgba(255,237,213,.15);border:1px solid rgba(255,237,213,.2);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 10px;color:#ffedd5;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.06em;} .foodie-header h4{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive!important;color:#fffbf5;font-size:20px;font-weight:400;margin:0 0 3px;text-shadow:1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.2);} .foodie-header p.sub{color:#fed7aa;font-size:12px;margin:0;} .wpr_social_icons{padding:12px 24px;background:#fef3e2;border-top:1px solid rgba(154,52,18,.08);display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:12px;} .wpr_social_icons a{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(154,52,18,.08);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;} .wpr_social_icons a:hover{background:#c2410c;}
content_before_menu_element:
🍕 Pizza🍝 Pasta🥗 Salads

Foodie Delight
